ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag set. Card is Wreck-It Ralph franchise per Lorcana databases. No external crossover IP risk (internal Disney property). The phrase 'out of order' is plot-central to the source film.

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: 'The last thing any gamer wants to see.'

Wreck-It Ralph franchise classification confirmed via Lorcana databases. Candy-bordered arcade aesthetic is consistent with Sugar Rush, the racing game central to the 2012 film. In the original Wreck-It Ralph, Fix-It Felix Jr. is literally labeled 'out of order' when Ralph goes AWOL — the phrase is plot-central.

Archazia's Island (set 7, March 7 2025) is the penultimate chapter of Lorcana's second story arc. Wreck-It Ralph has 8+ cards in the set; Out of Order is one of the few franchise-branded Action (non-character) cards.

Cost 7, Ruby, Common Action. 'Banish chosen character' — unconditional single-target removal with no strength or cost restriction on the target. 7-cost is premium; the effect scales to any character regardless of power.

related_cards.name: Wreck-It Ralph - Hero's Duty
related_cards.note: Same set, same franchise (no. 27/204); Outflank synergizes with banish effects

related_cards.name: Vanellope von Schweetz
related_cards.note: Sugar Rush protagonist; Wreck-It Ralph franchise companion
